candidates.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant and equipment, and amortisation of intangible assets
candidates.why: This is the only explicit operating D&A line above financial items, but it appears to be a total operating D&A line at the same level as other operating expenses rather than a COGS-specific D&A row tied to 'Raw materials and consumables'. Adding it to COGS would risk misclassification and double counting across operating buckets.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The separate D&A line is a broad operating total, not clearly attributable to the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant and equipment, and amortisation of intangible assets
candidates.why: This is the only explicit operating D&A line above financial items, but it appears to be a company-wide operating D&A line rather than an SG&A-specific depreciation/amortisation row nested under or clearly related to 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses'. Adding it to XSGA would risk pulling in non-SG&A D&A.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A-specific or R&D-specific D&A row is shown. Because the visible D&A row is not bucket-specific, conservative treatment is not to add it separately to XSGA.
